server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_median_cut_palette_respects_max_colors
def test_median_cut_palette_respects_max_colors() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(40, 30)
    palette = median_cut_palette(raster.data, raster.width, raster.height, max_colors=16)
    assert 2 <= len(palette) <= 16

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_pad_palette_rounds_to_power_of_two
def test_pad_palette_rounds_to_power_of_two() -> None:
    palette = [(1, 2, 3), (4, 5, 6), (7, 8, 9)]
    padded, size = pad_palette(palette)
    assert size in (4, 8)
    assert len(padded) == size

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_lzw_produces_non_empty_blocks
def test_lzw_produces_non_empty_blocks() -> None:
    compressed = encode_lzw([0, 0, 1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 3], palette_size=4)
    packed = pack_lzw_blocks(compressed)
    assert packed[-1] == 0
    assert len(compressed) > 0

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_encode_gif_header_and_trailer
def test_encode_gif_header_and_trailer() -> None:
    payload = encode_gif(solid_raster(24, 16, 10, 120, 200))
    assert payload[:6] == b"GIF89a"
    assert payload[-1] == 0x3B

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_encode_gif_decodes_with_pillow
def test_encode_gif_decodes_with_pillow() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(36, 28)
    payload = encode_gif(raster, max_colors=64)
    image = Image.open(BytesIO(payload))
    assert image.format == "GIF"
    assert image.size == (raster.width, raster.height)

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_gif_logical_screen_matches_raster
def test_gif_logical_screen_matches_raster() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(17, 11, 255, 0, 0)
    payload = encode_gif(raster, max_colors=32)
    width, height = struct.unpack_from("<HH", payload, 6)
    assert width == 17
    assert height == 11

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_map_to_palette_indices_in_range
def test_map_to_palette_indices_in_range() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(4, 4, 50, 100, 150)
    palette, _ = pad_palette([(50, 100, 150), (0, 0, 0)])
    indices = map_to_palette(raster.data, raster.width, raster.height, palette)
    assert len(indices) == 16
    assert all(0 <= value < len(palette) for value in indices)

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_lzw_roundtrip_varied_indices
def test_lzw_roundtrip_varied_indices() -> None:
    indices = list(range(8)) * 3 + [7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1, 0] * 2
    compressed = encode_lzw(indices, palette_size=8)
    assert len(compressed) > 0
    assert compressed[0] != 0

server/tests/test_gif_codec.py :: test_lzw_decode_handles_clear_codes
def test_lzw_decode_handles_clear_codes() -> None:
    first = encode_lzw([0, 1, 2, 3, 0, 1, 2, 3], palette_size=4)
    second = encode_lzw([0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 1, 1], palette_size=4)
    assert len(first) >= 1
    assert len(second) >= 1
    assert first != second
